tables.name: product_attributes
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_attributes` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_product_attributes_product_name` (`product_id`,`name`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_attributes_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_attribute_values
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_attribute_values` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `attribute_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `value` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_product_attribute_values_attribute_value` (`attribute_id`,`value`),
  KEY `fk_product_attribute_values_product` (`product_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_attribute_values_attribute` FOREIGN KEY (`attribute_id`) REFERENCES `product_attributes` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_attribute_values_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_discounts
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_discounts` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `discount_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `discount_value` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `start_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_discounts_product` (`product_id`),
  KEY `fk_product_discounts_variant` (`variant_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_discounts_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_discounts_variant` FOREIGN KEY (`variant_id`) REFERENCES `product_variants` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_images
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_images` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `image_url` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_primary` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `sort_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_images_product` (`product_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_images_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_offers
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_offers` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `offer_price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `start_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `end_date` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_offers_product` (`product_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_offers_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_prices
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_prices` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `mrp` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `selling_price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `cost_price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_prices_product` (`product_id`),
  KEY `fk_product_prices_variant` (`variant_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_prices_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_prices_variant` FOREIGN KEY (`variant_id`) REFERENCES `product_variants` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_reviews
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_reviews` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `user_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `rating` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `review` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `review_date` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_reviews_product` (`product_id`),
  KEY `fk_product_reviews_user` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_reviews_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_reviews_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `auth_users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_storefront_profiles
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_storefront_profiles` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `department` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `home_slider_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `home_slider_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `promo_slider_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `promo_slider_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `feature_section_enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `feature_section_order` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_new_arrival` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_best_seller` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_featured_label` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `catalog_badge` varchar(80) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fabric` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fit` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sleeve` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `occasion` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `shipping_note` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `product_id` (`product_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_storefront_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_tag_map
tables.createStatement:

  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `tag_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),

  UNIQUE KEY `uq_product_tag_map_product_tag` (`product_id`,`tag_id`),

  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_tag_map_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_tag_map_tag` FOREIGN KEY (`tag_id`) REFERENCES `product_tags` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_variants
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_variants` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `sku` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `cost_price` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `stock_quantity` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `opening_stock` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `weight` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `barcode` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_product_variants_product_sku` (`product_id`,`sku`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variants_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_variant_attributes
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_variant_attributes` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `attribute_name` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `attribute_value` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,

  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),

  KEY `fk_product_variant_attributes_variant` (`variant_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variant_attributes_variant` FOREIGN KEY (`variant_id`) REFERENCES `product_variants` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_variant_images
tables.createStatement:

  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `image_url` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_primary` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,

  KEY `fk_product_variant_images_variant` (`variant_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variant_images_variant` FOREIGN KEY (`variant_id`) REFERENCES `product_variants` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: product_variant_map
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `product_variant_map` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `attribute_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `value_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_product_variant_map_product` (`product_id`),
  KEY `fk_product_variant_map_attribute` (`attribute_id`),
  KEY `fk_product_variant_map_value` (`value_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variant_map_attribute` FOREIGN KEY (`attribute_id`) REFERENCES `product_attributes` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variant_map_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_product_variant_map_value` FOREIGN KEY (`value_id`) REFERENCES `product_attribute_values` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: sales_invoices
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `sales_invoices` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `invoice_number` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `issue_date` datetime NOT NULL,
  `due_date` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `subtotal` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `shipping_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `handling_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `total_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `currency_code` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `payment_status` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `order_id` (`order_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `invoice_number` (`invoice_number`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoices_status` (`status`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_sales_invoices_order` FOREIGN KEY (`order_id`) REFERENCES `storefront_orders` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: sales_invoice_items
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `sales_invoice_items` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `invoice_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_item_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `quantity` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `unit_price` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `line_total` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_items_invoice` (`invoice_id`),
  KEY `idx_sales_invoice_items_order_item` (`order_item_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_sales_invoice_items_invoice` FOREIGN KEY (`invoice_id`) REFERENCES `sales_invoices` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: stock_items

CREATE TABLE `stock_items` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `product_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `variant_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `warehouse_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `quantity` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `reserved_quantity` decimal(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `fk_stock_items_product` (`product_id`),
  KEY `fk_stock_items_variant` (`variant_id`),
  KEY `fk_stock_items_warehouse` (`warehouse_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_stock_items_product` FOREIGN KEY (`product_id`) REFERENCES `products` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_stock_items_variant` FOREIGN KEY (`variant_id`) REFERENCES `product_variants` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_stock_items_warehouse` FOREIGN KEY (`warehouse_id`) REFERENCES `common_warehouses` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

tables.name: storefront_orders
tables.createStatement:
CREATE TABLE `storefront_orders` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_number` varchar(40) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'placed',
  `first_name` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `last_name` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(180) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(40) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `address_line1` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `address_line2` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `city` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `state_name` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `country_name` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `postal_code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `customer_note` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `delivery_method` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `payment_method` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `payment_status` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `payment_gateway` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_gateway_order_id` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_gateway_payment_id` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_gateway_signature` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `payment_captured_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `subtotal` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `shipping_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `handling_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `total_amount` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  `currency_code` varchar(12) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp() ON UPDATE current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `order_number` (`order_number`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `storefront_order_events` (
  `id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status_after` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

  `occurred_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT current_timestamp(),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_storefront_order_events_order` (`order_id`),
  KEY `idx_storefront_order_events_type` (`event_type`),
  KEY `idx_storefront_order_events_time` (`occurred_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_storefront_order_events_order` FOREIGN KEY (`order_id`) REFERENCES `storefront_orders` (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
